title: dialium indum var. indum
intro: Dialium indum var. indum, also known as the African breadfruit or Burut tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The extracts from the Dialium indum var. indum plant have been used in herbal preparations to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Additionally, its seeds and leaves are used to make traditional remedies, including teas, infusions, and poultices, which are believed to offer health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
